'''√dh-r-n''' ('''dharana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadleg|deadleg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadleg|deadleg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| dharana
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dharanithi || dharaniji || dharanishi || dharani
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dharanuthuth || dharanujuj || dharanushush || dharan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dharanuthu || dharanuju || dharanushu || dharanu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dharanufuth || dharanufuj || dharanufush || dharanuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dharanethe || dharaneje || dharaneshe || dharane
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dharanothoth || dharanojoj || dharanoshosh || dharan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dharanotho || dharanojo || dharanosho || dharano
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dharanofoth || dharanofoj || dharanofosh || dharanof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dharanïfïf || dharanïfïf || dharanïfïf || dharanïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf || dharanïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dharanæthæ || dharanæjæ || dharanæshæ || dharanæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dharanathath || dharanajaj || dharanashash || dharan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dharanatha || dharanaja || dharanasha || dharana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dharanafath || dharanafaj || dharanafash || dharanaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || dharanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godharanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidharanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || dharannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godharannknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidharannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || dharanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godharannkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidharanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || dharanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godharannkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidharanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || dharanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godharannkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidharanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || dharansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godharannksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidharansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || dharanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godharannkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidharanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || dharanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godharannkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidharanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || dharanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godharannkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidharanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || dharannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godharannknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidharannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || dharannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godharannknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidharannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || dharannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godharannknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidharannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || dharanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godharannkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidharanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || dharanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godharannkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidharanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || dharanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godharannkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidharanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || dharanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godharannkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidharanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || dharanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godharannkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidharanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || dharanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godharannkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidharanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || dharanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godharannkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidharanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || dharanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godharannkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidharanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || dharanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godharannkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidharanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || dharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedhæræn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedharan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhæræn
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
